# Labour Dorm

Labour Dorm is a Hong Kong accommodation directory for people looking for monthly dormitory beds and worker accommodation.

## Canonical site

- https://labour-dorm.com/zh-hk/

## Main pages

- Chinese accommodation listings: https://labour-dorm.com/zh-hk/
- English accommodation listings: https://labour-dorm.com/en/
- About Labour Dorm: https://labour-dorm.com/zh-hk/about/
- XML sitemap: https://labour-dorm.com/sitemap.xml

## Key facts

- Listings show monthly prices in Hong Kong dollars.
- Each property page includes its location, facilities, available bed details and an enquiry route via WhatsApp.
- The site supports Traditional Chinese and English.
